debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
P : Type u_2
inst✝⁴ : NormedAddCommGroup V
inst✝³ : InnerProductSpace ℝ V
inst✝² : MetricSpace P
inst✝¹ : NormedAddTorsor V P
inst✝ : Fact (finrank ℝ V = 2)
⊢ ∃ c,
    0 < c ∧
      ∀ {n : ℕ},
        1 < n →
          ∀ {S : Finset P},
            S.card = n →
              ((↑S).Pairwise fun x y => 1 ≤ dist x y) →
                ∃ l,
                  finrank ℝ ↥l.direction = 1 ∧
                    (∃ p₁ p₂, p₁ ∈ S ∧ p₂ ∈ S ∧ l.SOppSide p₁ p₂) ∧ ∀ p ∈ S, c * ↑n ^ (-1 / 3) ≤ Metric.infDist p ↑l

use (4 * Real.pi)⁻¹
  constructor; · positivity
  intros n hn S hSn hdist
  let E := EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)
  have : Fact (finrank ℝ V = 2) := ‹_›
  let f : V ≃ₗᵢ[ℝ] E := Classical.choice <| (finrank_eq_two_iff ℝ V).mp this
  let iso : P ≃ᵢ E := (IsometryEquiv.vaddConst (Classical.arbitrary P)).trans f.toIsometryEquiv
  let S' : Finset E := S.map iso.toEmbedding
  have hS'n : S'.card = n := by simp [S', hSn]
  have hdist' : (S' : Set E).Pairwise fun x y ↦ 1 ≤ dist x y := by
    intro x hx y hy hxy
    simp only [Finset.coe_map, Set.mem_image] at hx hy
    obtain ⟨px, hpx, rfl⟩ := hx; obtain ⟨py, hpy, rfl⟩ := hy
    rw [dist_eq_dist_of_isometry iso.isometry]
    exact hdist hpx hpy (fun h ↦ hxy (congr_arg _ h))
  obtain ⟨l', hl'dim, ⟨p'₁, p'₂, ⟨hp'₁, hp'₂, hl'sep⟩⟩, hl'dist⟩ :=
    Archive.Imo.Imo2020Q6.imo2020_q6 n hn S' hS'n hdist'
  let l : AffineSubspace ℝ P := l'.map iso.symm.toIsometryEquiv.toAffineEquiv
  refine ⟨l, ?_, ⟨iso.symm p'₁, iso.symm p'₂, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
  · rw [AffineSubspace.map_direction, Submodule.finrank_map]; exact hl'dim
  · refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [Finset.mem_map_equiv]; exact hp'₁
    · rw [Finset.mem_map_equiv]; exact hp'₂
    · rwa [AffineSubspace.map_SOppSide_iff]
  · intro p hp
    rw [Metric.infDist_eq_infDist_of_isometry iso.isometry]
    convert hl'dist (iso p) _
    · simp
    · rw [Finset.mem_map_equiv]; exact hp
